titleStmt.title: SII 9.264: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 264. (A.R. No. 316 of 1925.) ON A SLAB PLANTED BEFORE THE TEMPLE OF HANUMAN AT HALYAM, KUDLIGI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1085 (mistake for 1075), Śrīmukha, Pushya, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Vyatīpāta. The date is irregular. In Śrīmukha, Pushya-amāvāsyā corresponded to A.D. 1154 January 15 Friday, not Monday, nor was there a solar eclipse on the day. It was not Uttarāyaṇa day, too. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and gives the genealogy of the dynasty from Tailapa to Vikramāditya VI. It records the grant of some land for the service of the god Agastēśvara at Yeḷeha, situated to the north of Koṭūr, by the king's feudatory Nāchidēvarasa of the Kadamba family, who was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred and Koṭūru twelve from his capital, Koṭūru. The teacher Hēmarāśidēva and Būpajīya are said to have been placed in charge of the lands granted to the same god by Bommidēvarasa and others. Sōyidēvarasa, son of Bommidēva of Koṭūru, Chavuḍiseṭṭi, Māriseṭṭi and others are also said to have granted lands for the service of the same god. Though the record refers itself to the reign of Vikramāditya VI, its date falls in the reign of Trailōkyamalla Taila III. The grant was probably put on stone in the year cited.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya
nagararaṁbhāmulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . sarasvatyai
śrīmadasēṣadēvanatamauḷivighaṭṭitapādapīṭhanurbīmarudātmakhēndu
ravivahnijalāṣṭavibhaktamūrtti tējōmayanadrijāramaṇanīgaga
stēśvaradēvanī jagatsvāmi niraṁtaraṁ bhaktakōṭige saṁtatamiṣṭasiddhiyaṁ . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṟidhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire taduvaṁśāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe . Āṁta ripubhūmipara karaṁ tavi si caḷu
kyarājyamuditōditamappaṁtire nijabhujadiṁdeḷeyaṁ tānaseye tailapaṁ kṣitipāḷaṁ . vritta .
naranāthāgraṇi tailapaṁge taneyaṁ satyāśrayaṁ tatsutaṁ dharaṇīvallabhavikramaṁ tadanujaṁ tāna
yyaṇayyakṣitīsvaranātaṁganujaṁ jitāri jayasiṁhaṁ tattanūjaṁ nṛpēśvaranantāhavamallanātana
magaṁ sōmēśvarōrbīśvaraṁ . negaḷdirddā bhuvanaikamallananujaṁ cāḷukyanārāyaṇaṁ nṛgamāṁ
dhātadiḷīpadharmmajacaritraṁ vikramāṭōpadiṁ digadhīśarttoḍesakkiyāge dhareyaṁ niḥkaṁṭakaṁ
māḍidaṁ jagadoḷu vikramacakravarttige samaṁ bappaṁnarārbhūmijaru .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabuda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ (.)
bhūmyēṁduśēkaraharavarapasādōtupattitrilōcana niratiśayadānavairōcana kadaṁ
bakulānvaya mayuravarmmavaṁśavibhūṣaṇaṁ caturāsītinagarādhiṣṭhitahimavaṁtasthāpi
tajayastaṁbānvayapavitra pārāṁganāputra kadaṁbakuḷācaḷōdayaśikhariśēkharamā
rttaṁḍa ripumaṁḍaḷikapaṁnagavajratuṁḍanapurbarūpakaṁdarppa maṁḍaḷikaghaṭasarppa Arirāyagarba
sarbasvasūṟekāṟa maṁḍaḷikajagaddaḷa śrīmallikārjunadēvaracaraṇasmaraṇapariṇatyāṁtaḥkaraṇa Ucaṁ
giya dēviyalabudhivaraprasādarumappa nacidēvarasaru kōgaḷiyaynū(nu)ṟu
maṁ koṭu(ra)rppanneraḍumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷdu koṭūralu sukasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . vinayāṁbhōnidhi satyaśaucaniḷayaṁ
śiṣṭēṣṭakaḷpadrumaṁ dyunadījūṭapadadvayābjamadhupaṁ śrīnācibhūpā
ḷa maṁtrinidānaṁ guṇaratnabhūṣaṇanenuttaṁ baṇṇikuṁ dhātrisajjanasaṁsēbyana
nōḷpī nāḷoḍeyanaṁ sāhityasarbajñanaṁ . vāridhimēkhaḷāvanige raṁjipa kuṁtaḷadē
ṣadoḷu mukhāṁbhōruhadalli nāsikamenippavolippa noṇaṁbavāḍiyoḷu sāra
menippa driṣṭiyene kōgaḷipaṁcaśataṁ tāne kōṭuresedirppudiṁdranamarāvatiyantevo
lentu nōrppaḍaṁ . Ā puraduttarabhāgadoḷāpaḍiyane negaḷda yeḷehayeṁbudu lakṣmīpa
rivritanagastēśanumāpati dēvādhidēvanesedippudariṁ . sakanripasaṁvatsarada (.) 1085 pravartti
śrīmukhasaṁvatsarada puṣyadamāvāsye sōmavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrā(ṁ)nti sū
ryyagrahaṇa vetīpātayōga samanisidaga(ṁ)ṇyapu(ṁ)ṇyadinadoḷu śrīmatu ma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ nācidēvarasaru biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdeḍe śrīmanagastēśvaradēvara trikā
lapūjegavaṁgabhōgakkaṁ naivēdyakkaṁ caitrapavitraparbbakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭhitajīrnōddhārakkaṁ tapōdha
narāhāradānakkaṁ dēvariṁ mūḍalu Aḍakedōṁṭa kaṁba 200 dēvariṁ baḍagaṇa haḷḷiya dāri
yiṁ paḍuvalu yerematta 1 haḷiya dāriyiṁ paḍuvalu matta 3 Ā keyiṁ baḍagalu matta 1 dāriyiṁ
mūḍalu matta 1 cikakoṭura holavēreyiṁ keṁgāḍu matta 2 saṁkharadēvara dāriyiṁ gauṭarageya mū
ḍalu keṁgāḍu vāṭanakeṟeyalli gadde muttada kaḍahu kaṁba 51 paḍuvaṇa cāvikallali gadde kaṁba 150 Ūroḷa
gaṇa nivēṣaṇa 4 gaṇavari so 1 koḍakke so 1 tōṭadali Aḍakeya mara 1 yelevaḷi 1 dēvagoḷaga dharmagoḷaga A
yadāya gaṭṭigauḍa mādagauḍayaṁtivaru biṭṭa dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru yācāryyaru
heṁmarāsidēvaru būpajīyaruṁ śrīyagastēśvaradēvarige maṁḍaḷika jagadaḷa bomidēvarasa
ru koṭa keyi haḷḷiya dāriyiṁ muḍalu matta 1 . Umādēviya pradhana paṁḍitayya gōparasa biṭṭa
keyi huḷiyare matta 1 modalēriya Āladagade kaṁba 50 dēvara sutalu puragaṇa yiṁtī biṭṭa dharmmavaṁ
pratipāḷisuvaru . koṭura hariharātmanu neṭṭane kaliboṁmidēvanātana kuvaranu paṭṭābhirāmane
nisida vairigharaṭṭaṁ jagadāḷa sōyidēvanripāḷaṁ . svasti śrīmānumāhāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri
cau(vu)ḍiseṭṭiyaru A(ṁ)ṇnanagaṁdhavāruṇa śrīmatsarvvādhikāri māriseṭṭiya
ru . rākṣasasaṁvatsaradaṁdu (.) svasti śrīmatu sāmaṁtasamudra mallarāyakuvara nā
rāyaṇarāyastapanācāryya muṟurāyarakuvaranārāyaṇa rāyastapanācā
ryya śrīmallikārjjunadēvaracaraṇasmaraṇapariṇatyāṁtaḥkaraṇarumappa maṇaṁbadēvarasaru
śrīmadagastēsvaradēvarige tīrththadiṁ muḍali vōṇiyiṁ baḍagali koṭa Eledōṁṭa
śautra sarvvamā(ṁ)nya yiṁtī biṭṭa dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷakaru Anaṁtagāvuḍa gōpāḷagauḍa
dēvagau(vu)ḍa rāmagauḍa sēnabōva bomaṇṇa vāmarasidēvara momakkaḷu hemmajīya dē
vajīya būpajīyana moṁmakkaḷu lakkajīya nāgajīya . yī dharmma Aḷipidaṁge vāraṇāsiyalu kuru
brāmhaṇara koṁda pāpa . mallikārjunali tapōdhanara koṁda pāpa nāyakanaraka .
Digital edition of SII 9.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
